tool_args.label: Pre-Payment (off-board fare collection)
tool_args.raw_text: Pay before you board by dipping MetroCard at sidewalk MetroCard machine or inserting coins at sidewalk coin machine. Take your proof of payment receipt. Enter through front or rear door of bus – no need to show receipt to the driver.

payload.description: Pay before you board by dipping MetroCard at sidewalk MetroCard machine or inserting coins at sidewalk coin machine. Take your proof of payment receipt. Enter through front or rear door of bus – no need to show receipt to the driver.

tool_args.label: Pre-Payment Enforcement (Eagle Team inspections)
tool_args.raw_text: Inspector teams conduct random checks of buses. $100 fine for passengers without a receipt.

payload.description: Inspector teams conduct random checks of buses. $100 fine for passengers without a receipt.

warnings: treatment_component.enforcement_authority is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Authority names refer to agency/entity records. Suggested relation: enforced_by.

tool_args.label: Bus Bulb SBS Station
tool_args.raw_text: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

payload.description: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding. Includes new shelter and fare collection machines.
